author: familiarcat
status: ENGAGEMENT AUTHORIZED — PHASE A EXECUTION THIS WEEK
message:
milestone: Phase 2 Video Implementation — Crew Deliberation & Execution Plan

CREW CONSENSUS: APPROVED FOR EXECUTION ✅

Enabled Capabilities:
- Crew video content learning (captions + speaker diarization)
- Visual UI design reference library (optimized keyframes)
- RAG integration (full transcripts + embeddings)
- Autonomous crew operations (upload → learn → design)

Locked Design Decisions:
✅ Speaker Diarization: YES (+$0.01/video, dialogue context)
✅ Dynamic Resolution Scaling: YES (-30% cost, ≥92% OCR accuracy)
✅ Keyframe Auto-Tagging: YES (+$0.002/video, AI-driven content_type)
✅ Video Formats: MP4 + MOV (covers 85%; Phase 3 expansion)

Final Cost: ~$0.072 per 30-sec video (competitive vs manual transcription)

Phase A Timeline: 8 weeks (5-week critical path to MVP)
- Track A: WorfGate Compliance (Weeks 1-2) — Worf lead
- Track B: Frame Extraction (Weeks 2-4) — Riker + Geordi
- Track C: OCR + Captions (Weeks 3-5) — Data + Yar
- Track D: Storage + Integration (Weeks 4-6) — Geordi + O'Brien
- Track E: Health + Observability (Weeks 5-7) — Crusher + O'Brien
- Track F: QA Hardening (Weeks 6-8) — Yar + Worf
- Track G: Rollout (Week 8+) — Uhura + Troi

YELLOW-Gate Conditions (Parallel, Non-Blocking):
- Security pen-test (codec + dynamic resolution) — Worf, EOW
- Performance load test (keyframe tagging) — Yar + O'Brien, EOW
- Codec compatibility validation — Data, EOW + 1 day
- Cost approval (spot-instance burst) — Quark, EOW
- Data residency compliance checks — Troi + Uhura, EOW

Crew Consensus: 9/10 alignment | Risk: Medium (BALANCED approach)

Authorization: APPROVED. Make it so.
